records.question: Which customers named Tillman Ernser who pay by Cheque became customers on or before 2018-02-28 11:37:44 and have a Residential address that is exactly on 1979-07-16 18:22:39 and started no later than 2010-12-26 08:52:50?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_to = '1979-07-16 18:22:39' AND customer_addresses.date_address_from <= '2010-12-26 08:52:50' AND customers.customer_name = 'Tillman Ernser' AND customers.payment_method = 'Cheque' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'Residential' AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2018-02-28 11:37:44'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Addresses ca ON c.customer_id = ca.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_name = 'Tillman Ernser'
  AND c.payment_method = 'Cheque'
  AND c.date_became_customer <= '2018-02-28 11:37:44'
  AND ca.date_address_to = '1979-07-16 18:22:39'
  AND ca.date_address_from <= '2010-12-26 08:52:50'
  AND ca.address_type = 'Residential'

records.question: Which customers have an address with the zip postcode 623 located in NewMexico?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN addresses ON customer_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.zip_postcode = '623' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'NewMexico'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Addresses ca ON c.customer_id = ca.customer_id
JOIN Addresses a ON ca.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE a.zip_postcode = '623' AND a.state_province_county = 'NewMexico'

records.question: Which customers named Devin Mills became customers on 2018-03-05 16:52:51 and pay by Cheque?

records.pred_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM Customers WHERE customer_name = 'Devin Mills' AND payment_method = 'Cheque' AND date_became_customer = '2018-03-05 16:52:51'

records.question: Which customers named exactly Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian use Cash as their payment method and had orders cancelled on or before 2018-03-21 11:20:46?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_orders.order_date <= '2018-03-21 11:20:46' AND customers.payment_method = 'Cash' AND customers.customer_name = 'Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian' AND customer_orders.order_status = 'Cancelled'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Orders co ON c.customer_id = co.customer_id
WHERE c.payment_method = 'Cash'
  AND c.customer_name = 'Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian'
  AND co.order_date <= '2018-03-21 11:20:46'
  AND co.order_status = 'Cancelled'
GROUP BY c.customer_id
HAVING COUNT(co.order_id) > 0

records.question: Which customers became customers on or before 2018-03-08 01:17:31, have a residential address that ended exactly on 2010-05-08 10:00:17, and have a contact number 542.983.0224 active at most until 2018-03-15 02:34:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN customer_contact_channels ON customers.customer_id = customer_contact_channels.customer_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_to = '2010-05-08 10:00:17' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'Residential' AND customer_contact_channels.active_to_date <= '2018-03-15 02:34:01' AND customer_contact_channels.contact_number = '542.983.0224' AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2018-03-08 01:17:31'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Addresses ca ON c.customer_id = ca.customer_id
JOIN Customer_Contact_Channels ccc ON c.customer_id = ccc.customer_id
WHERE c.date_became_customer <= '2018-03-08 01:17:31'
  AND ca.date_address_to = '2010-05-08 10:00:17'
  AND ca.address_type = 'Residential'
  AND ccc.active_to_date <= '2018-03-15 02:34:01'
  AND ccc.contact_number = '542.983.0224'

records.question: Which customers use Cheque as their payment method and have Handheld as a contact channel?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_contact_channels ON customers.customer_id = customer_contact_channels.customer_id
WHERE customer_contact_channels.channel_code = 'Handheld' AND customers.payment_method = 'Cheque'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Contact_Channels ccc ON c.customer_id = ccc.customer_id
WHERE c.payment_method = 'Cheque' AND ccc.channel_code = 'Handheld'

records.question: Which customers became customers exactly on 2018-03-08 01:17:31 and have addresses in Texas, USA at 41632 Kerluke Field, East Pascale where their address period started on or after 2003-07-08 05:33:19 and ended on or before 2010-05-08 10:00:17?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN addresses ON customer_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_from >= '2003-07-08 05:33:19' AND addresses.address_content = '41632 Kerluke Field' AND addresses.city = 'East Pascale' AND customers.date_became_customer = '2018-03-08 01:17:31' AND customer_addresses.date_address_to <= '2010-05-08 10:00:17' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Texas' AND addresses.country = 'USA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Addresses ca ON c.customer_id = ca.customer_id
JOIN Addresses a ON ca.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE c.date_became_customer = '2018-03-08 01:17:31'
  AND ca.date_address_from >= '2003-07-08 05:33:19'
  AND ca.date_address_to <= '2010-05-08 10:00:17'
  AND a.address_content = '41632 Kerluke Field'
  AND a.city = 'East Pascale'
  AND a.state_province_county = 'Texas'
  AND a.country = 'USA'
